<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-ê]][[de:Feuer-Schaf]][[hak:Tên-vi]][[ja:丁未]][[ko:정미]][[vi:Đinh Mùi]][[za:Dingmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-bī]][[zh-yue:丁未]][[zh:丁未]]

'''Yin Fire Goat also known as  Teibi''' (丁未) (ひのとひつじ、ていかのひつじ、ていび) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 44th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is [[Yang Fire Horse]] and the following combination is [[Yang Earth Monkey]]. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|Yin-Yang Five Elements]], the [[Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ [[Hinoto (丁)]] represents yin [[Fire (wuxing)|Fire (火)]], while the [[Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]]’ [[wèi|Goat (未)]] represents yin [[Earth (wuxing)|Earth (土)]], and they interact by [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Mutual Generation]] (Fire generates Earth).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Fire Goat (丁未)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-hitsuji
***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-hitsuji
***Onyomi 1: teibi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongmi (정미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mùi

==Years of Yin Fire Goat==
A Common Era year that leaves a remainder of 47 when divided by 60 is a [[Year]] of Teibi.
{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''Years of Teibi'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 47|47 AD]]
* [[AD 107|107 AD]]
* [[167|167 AD]]
* [[227|227 AD]]
* [[287|287 AD]]
* [[347|347 AD]]
* [[407|407 AD]]
* [[467|467 AD]]
* [[527|527 AD]]
* [[587|587 AD]]
* [[647|647 AD]]
* [[AD 707|707 AD]]
* [[AD 767|767 AD]]
* [[827|827 AD]]
* [[887|887 AD]]
* [[947|947 AD]]
|
* [[1007|1007 AD]]
* [[1067|1067 AD]]
* [[1127|1127 AD]]
* [[1187|1187 AD]]
* [[1247|1247 AD]]
* [[1307|1307 AD]]
* [[1367|1367 AD]]
* [[1427|1427 AD]]
* [[1487|1487 AD]]
* [[1547|1547 AD]]
* [[1607|1607 AD]]
* [[1667|1667 AD]]
* [[1727|1727 AD]]
* [[1787|1787 AD]]
* [[1847|1847 AD]]
* [[1907|1907 AD]]
* [[1967|1967 AD]]
|
* [[2027|2027 AD]]
* [[2087 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2147 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2207 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2267 AD]]
* [[2327 AD]]
* [[2387 AD]]
* [[25th century|2447 AD]]
* [[2507 AD]]
* [[2567 AD]]
* [[2627 AD]]
* [[2687 AD]]
* [[2747 AD]]
* [[2807 AD]]
* [[2867 AD]]
* [[2927 AD]]
* [[2987 AD]]
|}

=== Events ===
* The conflict in [[587|587 AD]] between the [[Soga clan]] and the [[Mononobe clan]] is known as the [[Soga–Mononobe conflict|Teibi Rebellion]].

==Months of Yin Fire Goat==
In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are [[Mizunoe (壬)]] or [[Hinoto (丁)]]), then [[June]] becomes the [[Month]] of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to a seasonal month (from [[Xiaoshu|Shōsho]] until the day before [[Liqiu|Rittō]]) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Goat==
=== Day Selection ===
A day of Teibi is the 15th day of [[Tenitsu-shin]].
== See Also ==
{{wikidata link|Q905292}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
